prompt: Audit and rewrite this at all depth, including subtle structural tells.

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-rewrite
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-produced
assertions.description: Output contains a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: output contains a prose block of similar length to input that differs from input

assertions.name: sentence-length-variance-improved
assertions.description: Rewrite has higher sentence-length variance than input
assertions.check: stdev(sentence-lengths) in rewrite > stdev(sentence-lengths) in input

assertions.name: rewrite-passes-all-grader
assertions.description: Re-grading the rewrite at all depth produces 0 hits across all severity classes

assertions.name: meaning-preserved
assertions.description: Rewrite preserves the scientific accuracy, key examples, and explanatory arc
